title.ko: 기계적 구동의 시계 또는 휴대시계; 시계 또는 휴대시계의 기계적 부분일반; 태양, 달 또는 별의 위치를 이용한 시계 (용수철이나 중력에 의해 움직여지는 기구일반 F03G; 전기기계시계 또는 휴대전기기계시계 G04C; 미리 선정된 시각 또는 미리 정해진 시간간격 후에 임의의 장치를 조작하는 부속수단 또는 조립수단을 가진 전기기계시계 G04C23/00; 정지장치가 있는 시계 또는 휴대시계 G04F7/08; 움직이는 부분이 없는 전자시계에 특히 적합한 구조상 세부, 또는 하우징 G04G17/00)
title.en: MECHANICALLY-DRIVEN CLOCKS OR WATCHES; MECHANICAL PARTS OF CLOCKS OR WATCHES IN GENERAL; TIME-PIECES USING THE POSITION OF THE SUN, MOON, OR STARS (spring- or weight-driven mechanisms in general F03G;electromechanical clocks or watches G04C;electromechanical clocks with attached or built-in means operating any device at preselected times or after predetermined time intervals G04C0023000000;clocks or watches with stop devices G04F0007080000;structural details or housings specially adapted for electronic time-pieces with no moving parts G04G0017000000)

definition.ko: 구동기구 G04B1/00 감기 보통것; 자동; 결합된 것 G04B3/00; 5/00; 7/00 관리; 감는 부재 G04B9/00, G04B11/00 시계의 운동기구 탈진기(ESCAPEMENT); 진동수 안정장치; 진동수 설정; 톱니바퀴 장치, 이들을 조절하는 것 G04B15/00; 17/00; 18/00; 13/00; 35/00 시각의 표시 G04B19/00, G04B21/00, G04B23/00, G04B25/00 시각의 맞춤 G04B27/00 틀; 지지; 캘리버(CALIBER) G04B29/00; 31/00; 33/00 시계장치의 보호 케이스; 크리스탈, 유리; 다른 보호수단 G04B37/00; 39/00; 41/00, G04B43/00 보통시계가 아닌 것 G04B45/00, G04B47/00, G04B49/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제사항 G04B99/00

title.ko: 구동기구
title.en: Driving mechanisms

title.ko: 구동기구
title.en: Driving mechanisms
with driving weight
Mechanisms in which the clockwork acts as the driving weight
with several weights
Driving weights; Chains; Chain wheels; Arbors for chain wheels

title.ko: 태엽이 있는 것
title.en: with mainspring
with several mainsprings

title.ko: 태엽; 태엽용 받침판(받침판이 달린 태엽 G04B 1/18; 합금 C22C; 용수철 일반 F16F)
title.en: Mainsprings; Bridles therefor (mainsprings with bridles G04B0001180000;alloys C22C;springs in general F16F)

title.ko: 태엽통; 축; 태엽통축 (태엽을 떼었다 붙였다 하기 쉽게 하는 장치 G04B33/14)
title.en: Barrels; Arbors; Barrel axles (arrangements facilitating the removal of the mainspring G04B0033140000)

title.ko: 태엽통 또는 축과 태엽 끝을 결합하는 구조
title.en: Constructions for connecting the ends of mainsprings with the barrel or the arbor

title.ko: 태엽통속에 설치되거나 태엽통에 부착된 태엽이 파열 또는 지나치게 감아지는 것을 보호하는 장치(감는 쇠 또는 같은 종류의 것에 결합되어 있는 것 G04B 3/06, G04B 3/10; 자동으로 감게 되어 있는 장치에 결합되어 있는 것 G04B 5/24)
title.en: Protecting arrangements against rupture or overwinding of the mainspring located in the barrel or attached to the barrel (in connection with keys or the like G04B0003060000, G04B0003100000;in connection with automatic winding devices G04B0005240000)

title.ko: 태엽의 동력변동의 보정 (태엽의 기계적인 형상에 의한 것 G04B1/14)
title.en: Compensation of changes in the motive power of the mainspring (by mechanical shaping of the mainspring G04B0001140000)
with both mainsprings and driving weights
driven by liquids or gases; Liquid or gaseous drives for mechanically-controlled secondary clocks

title.ko: 손이나 기계에 의한 시계장치의 통상적인 감기 여러 개의 태엽이나 구동중추를 동시에 감는 것
title.en: Winding

title.ko: 손이나 기계에 의한 시계장치의 통상적인 감기 여러 개의 태엽이나 구동중추를 동시에 감는 것
title.en: Normal winding of clockworks by hand or mechanically; Winding-up several mainsprings or driving weights simultaneously
Removably-mounted keys or the like

title.ko: 고정된 감는 쇠, 단추 또는 크라운(양분된 태엽 감는 축 G04B 37/06)
title.en: Rigidly-mounted keys, knobs, or crowns (divided winding stems G04B0037060000)

title.ko: 지나치게 감지 않도록 방지수단을 가진 감는 쇠 또는 같은 종류의 것(태엽통 속에 배치된 또는 태엽통에 부착된 보호장치 G04B 1/20, 자동으로 감게 되어 있는 장치에 결합되어 있는 것 G04B 5/24)
title.en: Keys or the like with means preventing overwinding (protecting devices arranged in, or attached to, the barrel G04B0001200000;in connection with automatic winding devices G04B0005240000)

title.ko: 케이스의 부분에 의한 것
title.en: by parts of the cases

title.ko: 지나치게 감는 것을 방지하는 보호수단 (감는 쇠에 결합되어 있는 것 G04B3/06; 태엽통 속에 배치된 또는 태엽통에 부착되어 진 것 G04B1/20; 자동으로 감는 장치에 결합되어진 것 G04B5/24)
title.en: Protecting means preventing overwinding (arranged in, or attached to, the barrel G04B0001200000;in connection with keys G04B0003060000;in connection with automatic winding devices G04B0005240000)

title.ko: 기계적 수단에 의한 것, 예. 공기모터 (전기적 또는 전기기계적 수단을 갖는 감기 G04C)
title.en: by mechanical means, e.g. pneumatic motor (winding-up with electric or electromechanical means G04C)

title.ko: 자동적 감기
title.en: Automatic winding-up
by self-winding caused by movement of the watch
by oscillating weights the movement of which is limited
acting in one direction only
acting in both directions
by oscillating weights the movement of which is not limited
acting in one direction only
acting in both directions
Construction of the weights
Supports, suspensions, or guide arrangements, for oscillating weights
Suspension of the oscillating weight at its centre of rotation
by movements of other objects, e.g. by opening hand-bag, by opening case, by opening door; Winding-up by wind power
by thermometric, barometric, or like effects or alterations

title.ko: 지나치게 감는 것을 방지하는 보호수단 (태엽통속에 배치된 것이나 태엽통에 부착되어진 것 G04B1/20; 감는 쇠 또는 같은 종류의 것에 결합되어 있는 것 G04B3/06; 케이스의 부분에 결합되어 있는 것 G04B3/10)
title.en: Protecting means preventing overwinding (arranged in, or attached to, the barrel G04B0001200000;in connection with keys or the like G04B0003060000;in connection with parts of the cases G04B0003100000)
Combined normal and automatic winding-up

title.ko: 감는 상태의 관리, 예. 감는 양의 지시
title.en: Supervision of the state of winding, e.g. indicating the amount of winding

title.ko: 감는 상태에 따라 제어되는 장치, 예. 지나치게 감아지는 것에 대하여 보호할 여유를 가진 장치 (태엽통속 또는 그 위에 부착된 지나치게 감아지는 것을 방지하는 보호수단 G04B1/20; 감는 쇠 또는 같은 종류의 것에 결합된 보호수단 G04B3/06; 케이스의 부분에 결합되어진 것 G04B3/10; 자동적으로 감는 장치에 결합되어진 것 G04B5/24)
title.en: Devices controlled by such state, e.g. device affording protection against overwinding (protecting means preventing overwinding arranged in or on the barrel G04B0001200000;protecting means in connection with keys or the like G04B0003060000;in connection with parts of the cases G04B0003100000;in connection with automatic winding devices G04B0005240000)
Click devices, stop clicks or clutches for winding
Devices allowing the motion of a rotatable part in only one direction
Pawl constructions therefor, e.g. pawl secured to an oscillating member actuating a ratchet

title.ko: 치차기구
title.en: Gearwork

title.ko: 톱니바퀴; 작은 톱니바퀴(pinion); 스핀들(spindle); 피봇 (베어링 G04B31/00)
title.en: Wheels; Pinions; Spindles; Pivots (bearings G04B0031000000)

title.ko: 탈진기(Escapement) (전기기계적 시계에 있어서 진동을 회전운동으로 바꾸는 전기적 또는 자기적인 수단 G04C 5/00)
title.en: Escapements (electric or magnetic means for converting oscillatory to rotary motion in electromechanical time-pieces G04C0005000000)
permanently in contact with the regulating mechanism
Cylinder escapements
Free escapements
Lever escapements
with constant impulses for the regulating mechanism

title.ko: 조정 (조정용 공구 G04D1/02); 레버 또는 같은 종류의 것의 흔들리는 각도를 제한하는 것
title.en: Adjusting (tools therefor G04D0001020000); Restricting the amplitude of the lever or the like
Component parts or constructional details, e.g. construction of the lever or the escape wheel

title.ko: 진동수 안정화기구
title.en: Mechanisms for stabilising frequency
Oscillators acting by gravity, e.g. pendulum swinging in a plane
Oscillators acting by spring tension
Oscillators with hairsprings, e.g. balance
Oscillators with coil springs stretched and unstretched axially
Oscillators with torsion strips or with springs acting in the same manner as torsion strips, e.g. weight oscillating in a horizontal plane

title.ko: 진동수 안정화기구의 보상
title.en: Compensation of mechanisms for stabilizing frequency

title.ko: 온도변화의 영향에 대한 것(온도변화에 무관한 합금 C22C)
title.en: for the effect of variations of temperature (alloys independent of variations of temperature C22C)
for the effect of variations of atmospheric pressure
for the effect of variations of the impulses
for the effect of imbalance of the weights, e.g. tourbillon

title.ko: 회전식 조속기, 예. 원심 조속기, 임펠러(impeller)식 조속기 (타종기구용 G04B21/06)
title.en: Rotating governors, e.g. centrifugal governors, fan governors (for striking mechanism G04B0021060000)
Component parts or constructional details, e.g. collet, stud
for fastening the hairspring onto the balance
Mechanisms for setting frequency
Regulator devices; Indexing devices
Adjusting the beat of the pendulum, balance, or the like, e.g. putting into beat
by setting the collet or the stud of a hairspring
Component parts or constructional details

title.ko: 시각수단에 의한 시각의 지시 (전구에 의한 것 G04C17/02; 표시장치일반 G09)
title.en: Time indicating

title.ko: 시각수단에 의한 시각의 지시 (전구에 의한 것 G04C17/02; 표시장치일반 G09)
title.en: Indicating the time by visual means (by electric lamps G04C0017020000;display arrangements in general G09)
Back-gearing arrangements between gear train and hands
Hands; Discs with a single mark or the like

title.ko: 문자판(시계장치가 없는 시진의 G04B 49/04)
title.en: Dials (for time-pieces without clockwork G04B0049040000)
Geometrical arrangement of the graduations
Ornamental shape of the graduations or the surface of the dial; Attachment of graduations to the dial
Selection of materials for dials or graduations
Fastening the dials to the clock or the watch plates
Shiftable dials, e.g. indicating alternately from 1 to 12 and from 13 to 24
Graduations on the crystal or glass, on the bezel, or on the rim
Indicating by numbered bands, drums, discs, or sheets
Drums
Arrangements for indicating different local apparent times; Universal time-pieces
by means of additional hands or additional pairs of hands
Clocks or watches with date indicators; Clockwork calendars
characterised by the shape of the date indicator
disc-shaped
Devices for setting the date indicators manually
Driving or releasing mechanisms
drum-shaped
Clocks or watches with indicators for tides, for the phases of the moon, or the like
Adjustable guide marks or pointers for indicating determined points of time
Illumination of dials or hands
by luminescent substances
Position of the hands projected optically

title.ko: 음향 수단에 의한 시각의 표시 (미리 선정된 시각에 대한 것 G04B23/00; 전기적 음향 수단에 의한 것 G04C21/04; 음향 발생장치 그 자체 G10)
title.en: Indicating the time by acoustic means (at preselected times G04B0023000000;by electro-acoustic means G04C0021040000;sound-producing apparatus per seG10)

title.ko: 60분, 30분 또는 15분에 발하는 정시의 타종기구
title.en: Regular striking mechanisms giving the full hour, half hour, or quarter hour
Hour wheels; Racks or rakes; Snails or similar control mechanisms
Details of striking mechanisms, e.g. hammer or fan governor

title.ko: 음향체; 피리; 음악 장치 (전기적 음향 송신기를 포함하는 것 G04C21/00)
title.en: Sounding bodies; Whistles; Musical apparatus (with electro-acoustic transmitters G04C0021000000)
Releasing or locking the regular stroke, e.g. for silence during the night
Reiterating watches or clocks
Winding-up the striking mechanism by the clockwork; Winding-up the clockwork by the striking mechanism

title.ko: 미리 선정된 시각에 청각적 신호를 발생하는 장치 (전기적으로 해제되는 알람 신호 G04C 21/00; 메트로놈 G04F 5/02; 음향발생장치 그 자체 G10)
title.en: Arrangements producing acoustic signals at preselected times (electrically-released alarm signals G04C0021000000;metronomes G04F0005020000;sound-producing apparatus per seG10)

title.ko: 자명종 (깨우는 신호를 전기적으로 해제하는 것 G04C21/000)
title.en: Alarm clocks
Alarm signal stop arrangements
with coarse and fine setting of the preselected time
adjustable for several preselected times with automatic stopping of the signal
operating on successive days without resetting; operating only once in each 24 hours
with presignal; with repeated signal; with changeable intensity of sound

title.ko: 자명장치가 있는 회중시계나 손목시계 (피부에의 자극에 의하여 신호를 전하는 것 G04B 25/04)
title.en: Alarm watches to be worn in pockets or on the wrist (giving signals by stimulating the skin G04B0025040000)

title.ko: 다른 수단이나 결합된 수단에 의하여 시각을 지시하는 것(전기적 또는 전기기계적 지시 G04C)
title.en: Indicating the time by other means or by combined means (electric or electromechanical indicating G04C)
by feeling; Clocks or watches for blind persons
Alarm clocks or watches with devices stimulating the skin
by moving figures, e.g. cuckoo-clock, trumpet clock
Mechanical devices for setting the time-indicating means
by making use of the winding means
with clutch wheel
with rocking bar
by using parts of the case
Frameworks, supports, or arrangements of the clockwork parts in relation to each other, so-called "calibers"
Frameworks
Plates; Bridges; Cocks
Connecting or supporting parts

title.ko: 베어링; 점지지 또는 대향점 지지(Counter-point suspension); 선회축 받이; 베어링용 단부재(Single part) (베어링 일반 F16C)
title.en: Bearings; Point suspensions or counter-point suspensions; Pivot bearings; Single parts therefor (bearings in general F16C)

title.ko: 사용되는 재료에 의하여 특징 지워지는 것
title.en: characterised by the material used

title.ko: 보석축받이 (G04B31/04가 우선)
title.en: Jewel bearings (G04B0031040000 takes precedence)
Metallic bearings
Plastic bearings
Shock-damping bearings
with jewel hole and cap jewel
Manufacture or mounting processes
Lubrication

title.ko: 캘리버(Caliber)
title.en: Calibers
Circular calibers
Non-circular calibers
of extremely flat shape

title.ko: 윤열이 다른 면내에 부착되어 지는 것, 예. 상호 평행 또는 경사진 것 (G04B33/10이 우선)
title.en: in which the gear train is arranged in different planes, e.g. parallel or inclined to each other (G04B0033100000 takes precedence)
with seconds hand arranged in the centre of the dial
for extremely-long running times

title.ko: 태엽이나 태엽통이 간단히 떼었다 붙였다 할 수 있는 캘리버 (태엽 G04B1/14; 태엽통, 축 G04B1/16)
title.en: Calibers of which the mainsprings or barrels are easily removable (mainsprings G04B0001140000;barrels, arbors G04B0001160000)
with arrangements affording protection of the clockwork against damage as a consequence of a rupture of the mainspring
Adjusting the gear train, e.g. the backlash of the arbors, depth of meshing of the gears

title.ko: 케이스
title.en: Protection of the clockwork against damage from outside

title.ko: 케이스
title.en: Cases
Evacuated cases; Cases filled with gases or liquids; Cases containing substances for absorbing or binding moisture or dust
Mounting the clockwork in the case; Shock-absorbing mountings
Fixed mountings for pocket or wrist watches
Forming the passage for the winding stem through the case; Divided winding stems
Hermetic sealing of openings, joints, passages, or slits
of winding stems
of the back cover of pocket or wrist watches

title.ko: 특수목적용 케이스, 예. 반지와 조합된 시계, 단추와 조합된 시계 (시계 방호물 또는 시계 보호물 A45C11/10, A45C11/12; 화장용 분갑이 붙은 시계 A45D33/30)
title.en: Cases for special purposes, e.g. watch combined with ring, watch combined with button (watch guards or protectors A45C0011100000, A45C0011120000;watches combined with cosmetic powder containers A45D0033300000)

title.ko: 케이스 일부를 형성하는 시계용 현수장치, 지지체 또는 스탠드 (손목시계 밴드, 손목시계용 부착수단 A44C5/00)
title.en: Suspending devices, supports, or stands for time-pieces in so far as they form part of the case (wrist-watch straps, fastening means therefor A44C0005000000)
Fastening the case to the bracelet

title.ko: 회중 또는 팔목시계를 위한 것 (G04B37/02 ～ G04B37/16이 우선)
title.en: for pocket or wrist watches (G04B0037020000-G04B0037160000 takes precedence)
with hinged covers or backs
Materials or processes of manufacturing pocket watch or wrist watch cases
Watch crystals; Fastening or sealing crystals; Clock glasses
Sealing crystals or glasses
Locking or holding devices for pendulums, chimes, or the like, for use during transport
Protecting clockworks by shields or other means against external influences, e.g. magnetic fields

title.ko: 지시수단이나 케이스가 특수한 효과, 예. 미적 효과를 발휘하는 시계 (문자판의 장식형상 G04B19/10)
title.en: Clocks with unusual features

title.ko: 지시수단이나 케이스가 특수한 효과, 예. 미적 효과를 발휘하는 시계 (문자판의 장식형상 G04B19/10)
title.en: Time-pieces of which the indicating means or cases provoke special effects, e.g. aesthetic effect (ornamental shaping of dials G04B0019100000)
Time-pieces of which the clockwork is visible partly or wholly
Time-pieces with invisible drive, e.g. with hands attached to rotating glass disc

title.ko: 시계의 작동 또는 등시성(等時性)을 방해하지 않는 다른 부품과 결합된 시계 (G04B37/12가 우선; 시각표시장치를 가진 필기구 또는 제도구 B43K29/087; 자동차용 미러와 결합한 것 B60R1/12; 카메라, 영사기 또는 사진 인화장치와 결합된 것 G03B29/00)
title.en: Time-pieces combined with other articles which do not interfere with the running or the time-keeping of the time-piece (G04B0037120000 takes precedence;writing or drawing implements with devices for indicating time B43K0029087000;combinations with vehicle mirror assemblies B60R0001120000;combined with cameras, projectors, or photographic printing apparatus G03B0029000000)
Installations within mirrors, pictures, furniture, or other household articles
with attached ornaments or amusement apparatus
with attached measuring instruments, e.g. pedometer, barometer, thermometer, compass
Time-pieces using the position of the sun, moon, or stars
Sundials
Graduation or shaping of dials
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
